_comment: Wall-clock time (in seconds) each per-query .cpp file took to generate. For queries 6, 7, 9-12, 14-43 these come straight from the duration_ms field the spawned code-generator agents reported on completion. For 1-5, 8, 13 — the canonical hand-written examples used to seed the agents — the times below are session-clock estimates of how long it took to draft each one (writing + edit-to-compile loop).
model: Anthropic Claude (Opus / Sonnet, mixed effort levels via @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk)
policy: When emitting the final results JSON we add the per-query generation time to the cold (first-try) timing only — warm tries reuse the binary already on disk so they pay no generation cost.
